ac61c28a1840.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
ac61c28a1840.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
ac61c28a1840.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

838d126e2988.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
838d126e2988.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
838d126e2988.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

23e682dce347.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
23e682dce347.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

72ceb4e35de9.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
72ceb4e35de9.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
72ceb4e35de9.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

0b4dddbeb20d.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
0b4dddbeb20d.description: Your 4.8/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P0.0). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
0b4dddbeb20d.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

b09a079c2664.title: Guest experience outpaces formal trust record
b09a079c2664.description: Guests enjoy the venue but the compliance record hasn't kept up. One poor inspection would make a private gap public. The fix is proactive compliance work, not more marketing.
b09a079c2664.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible

8bd1baa31bd0.title: Ranked #2 of 2 locally — peers are ahead
8bd1baa31bd0.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

6ee50d0657bf.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
6ee50d0657bf.description: You trail peers by 1.4 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

9d34173a211e.title: Protect the 4.8/5 rating — it took years to build
9d34173a211e.description: With 294 reviews at 4.8/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
